components.description: Controller-visible delayed position in target-relative coordinates: target position minus delayed effector position.
components.label: Target-relative delayed position

components.description: Controller-visible delayed velocity as the negative delayed effector velocity in the target-relative feedback basis.
components.label: Negated delayed velocity

variable.description: The feedback vector consumed by the GRU controller. Components are ordered by descriptor basis identity rather than consumer-local row constants.
variable.label: Controller-visible feedback vector

metadata.source_timing: controller step after feedback delay and before GRU update

metadata.source_timing: controller step after feedback delay and before GRU update

fidelity_status.exact_objective_terms_scope: false because force/filter-state and disturbance-integrator state costs from the analytical C&S schedule are omitted from the current Feedbax GRU loss contract

omitted_terms.analytical_role: unit-weight force/filter state cost in the C&S 8D schedule
unit-weight disturbance-integrator state cost in the C&S 8D schedule

objective_fidelity.selection_policy: rollout validation loss only; analytical action and I/O metrics are audit-only

fidelity_status.stochastic_projection: Feedbax GRU rollout uses C&S-shaped sensory, command, signal-dependent, and plant/load force noise channels without feeding the 48D delay-augmented analytical state to the GRU.
fidelity_status.temporary_stochastic_bridge: temporary RLRMP LSS wrapper implements sensory Channel, additive and signal-dependent motor Channel, and sampled physical-process mechanics.epsilon; future Feedbax acausal/ODE plant support should subsume this wrapper

loss_summary.force_filter_state_cost_note: No force/filter-state quadratic term is synthesized because this nominal Feedbax loss path has no clean C&S physical force/integrator state target exposed through the task state contract.
loss_summary.simple_reach_position_loss_contract: effector_pos_running compares mechanics.effector.pos to the SimpleReaches same-coordinate target sequence over every transition, using the configured C&S Eq. 15 power-law discount when requested.

params.coordinate_contract: Feedbax SimpleReaches supplies mechanics.effector.pos targets in the same Cartesian metre coordinates as the point-mass effector state.

initial_hidden_encoder.initialization_note: Exact zero affine weights and bias preserve the zero-H0 baseline at initialization while remaining trainable through ordinary rollout loss.

params.time_axis_contract: Hold-free fixed nominal task: Feedbax n_steps=61 yields exactly 60 transition/control-cost stages and one position target per transition; delayed-reach epoch masks are not used.

warnings: rlrmp: local-embed is a development mode; the image reflects the working tree at render time (commit acbdf8d7008a073b3fe9375b5b915288ac05183d, dirty=True). Use github-ref or pypi for content-pinned runs.

feedbax: local-embed is a development mode; the image reflects the working tree at render time (commit 72344da64f63b0b42527ee33b52c2190e1ccc1f7, dirty=True). Use github-ref or pypi for content-pinned runs.
